description_long: This object is a classic Nokia mobile phone, featuring a robust, dark blue plastic body with a slightly curved rectangular shape. The front face is dominated by a small monochrome green-tinted screen, above a white oval navigation button and a grid of white, oval-shaped physical buttons arranged in a 3x4 keypad layout. The sides are smooth and slightly beveled, with no visible ports or buttons, emphasizing the phone's simple and durable design. The back and edges appear solid and unadorned, typical of early 2000s mobile phones. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian device built for durability and ease of use, with minimal decorative elements. The phone is compact, fitting easily in one hand, and is likely constructed primarily from plastic with some internal metal components.
description: A classic Nokia mobile phone with a dark blue plastic body, a small green-tinted screen, and a white oval keypad. The design is simple, durable, and compact.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green-tinted screen, white navigation button, and the full keypad layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the phone's thickness and the raised profile of the keypad buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the back of the phone, with the screen and keypad edges just visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the phone's side profile and the curvature of the body, with keypad buttons visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small white 'NOKIA' logo is visible above the screen on the front face.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a green-tinted monochrome interface, but no specific icons, text, or imagery are clearly visible.
attribute_camera_placement: None; no camera modules or lenses are visible on any side of the object.
attribute_button_layout: There are twelve oval-shaped white buttons arranged in a 3x4 grid below the screen, with an additional oval navigation button above the keypad.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: None; the phone does not have any external case, cover, or protective accessory.
